description_long: This is a medium-sized, round pumpkin with a vibrant orange exterior and a green, slightly bent stem at the top. The surface is segmented with shallow vertical ridges and subtle, uneven texturing, giving it a natural, organic appearance. On one side, the pumpkin is carved with a traditional jack-o'-lantern face, featuring two triangular eyes and a jagged, toothy mouth. The carved openings reveal a hollow interior, typical of pumpkins prepared for decorative purposes. The rest of the pumpkin's surface is unadorned, with no additional markings or accessories. The overall look is festive and suitable for seasonal urban displays, such as Halloween decorations on porches or sidewalks.
description: A round orange pumpkin with a green stem and a classic jack-o'-lantern face carved on one side, featuring triangular eyes and a jagged mouth.
description_view_0: The pumpkin is shown with a partial view of the carved face, revealing one triangular eye and part of the jagged mouth.
description_view_1: This view displays the uncarved back of the pumpkin, highlighting its smooth, segmented surface and the green stem.
description_view_2: The pumpkin is seen from a side angle, showing mostly the uncarved surface with a hint of the carved mouth visible at the edge.
description_view_3: The front of the pumpkin is fully visible, showcasing the complete jack-o'-lantern face with two triangular eyes and a jagged mouth.
attribute_carving_pattern: Traditional jack-o'-lantern face with two triangular eyes and a jagged, toothy mouth cut out of the front surface.
